solutions.solution: (a) According to the figure. So, two blank sides of cube are opposite to two another blank sides and □ is opposite to ⊕. Hence, only option (a) is correct which gives the exact sequence of symbols opposite to the blank face of cube.
(d) According to unfolded dice. So, □ is opposite to □, □ is opposite to □, and ⊙ is opposite to □. Clearly, all the cubes I, II, III and IV can be formed.
(c) As unfolded dice is given. So, □ is opposite to □, □ is opposite to □, and ⊘ is opposite to ⚹. Hence, option (c) has the correct cubes, which can be formed when unfolded figure will be folded.
